title: pellaea andromedifolia
intro: Pellaea andromedifolia, also known as Andromeda fern or Lemon-scented fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pellaea andromedifolia include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as being used as an antiseptic and wound healer. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
